hero.thesis: Create a mini-course on a niche skill and distribute it via an email list to achieve a consistent MRR of $2,800.
hero.marketSize: The e-learning market is booming, with a projected $375 billion market size by 2026.
hero.payingEvidence: Courses on niche skills on platforms like Udemy and Skillshare have tens of thousands of students paying $50-$200 per course.

ninetyDay.title: Identify Your Niche and Audience

actions.action: Research niche skills trending in online communities like Reddit's r/OnlineCourses and LinkedIn Learning.
actions.success: Identify a specific niche skill with at least 5,000 active community members.

actions.action: Define your ideal customer persona using Notion to document demographic and psychographic details.
actions.success: Complete a detailed customer persona document.

actions.action: Join 3 online communities related to your niche on Discord and Reddit.
actions.success: Engage with 10 community members and gather insights on their learning needs.

ninetyDay.metric: Validated niche with a defined audience of at least 5,000.

ninetyDay.title: Create Course Outline and Content Plan

actions.action: Draft a course outline in Notion, breaking down the skill into 4 main modules.
actions.success: Complete a detailed course outline with 4 modules.

actions.action: Create a content calendar in Notion, scheduling writing and editing tasks for the next 6 weeks.
actions.success: Finalize a detailed 6-week content calendar.

actions.action: Research successful mini-courses on Gumroad and Stan Store for structural inspiration.
actions.success: Identify key structural elements from 3 successful courses.

ninetyDay.metric: Complete course outline and content calendar.

actions.action: Write the script for Module 1 in Google Docs, focusing on clarity and engagement.
actions.success: Completed Module 1 script.

actions.action: Draft an accompanying workbook for Module 1 using Canva.
actions.success: Finished Module 1 workbook.

actions.action: Review and revise Module 1 content with feedback from a peer in your niche Discord community.
actions.success: Incorporated feedback into Module 1 content.

ninetyDay.title: Produce Course Videos

actions.action: Record voiceovers for Module 1 using Audacity, ensuring high-quality audio.
actions.success: Final voiceover for Module 1 completed.

actions.action: Edit Module 1 video using DaVinci Resolve, integrating voiceover and visuals.
actions.success: Module 1 video edited and ready.

actions.action: Upload Module 1 video to a private Vimeo account for beta testing.
actions.success: Module 1 video uploaded and accessible for testers.

ninetyDay.metric: Module 1 video completed and uploaded for testing.

actions.action: Draft a pre-sale email sequence in ConvertKit targeting your email list.
actions.success: Pre-sale email sequence drafted.

actions.action: Launch a landing page on Webflow to collect pre-sale registrations.
actions.success: Landing page live with pre-sale registration form.

actions.action: Engage in targeted outreach in online communities to drive traffic to your pre-sale page.
actions.success: Generate at least 20 pre-sale signups.

ninetyDay.title: Complete Course Development

actions.action: Write scripts and workbooks for Modules 2-4.
actions.success: Scripts and workbooks for Modules 2-4 completed.

actions.action: Record and edit videos for Modules 2-4.
actions.success: Videos for Modules 2-4 completed.

actions.action: Upload all course content to Gumroad for distribution.
actions.success: All course content uploaded and ready for launch.

ninetyDay.metric: All course content completed and uploaded.

ninetyDay.title: Prepare for Course Launch

actions.action: Create a course launch email sequence in ConvertKit.
actions.success: Course launch email sequence prepared.

actions.action: Set up automated payment processing with Stripe for course purchases.
actions.success: Stripe payment processing setup completed.

actions.action: Perform a complete course walkthrough to ensure quality and coherence.
actions.success: Course walkthrough completed with no issues.

ninetyDay.metric: Launch readiness confirmed with email and payment systems functional.

ninetyDay.title: Launch and Market Your Course

actions.action: Send the launch email to your list and post in online communities.
actions.success: Launch email sent and community posts live.

actions.action: Activate a 20% launch discount for the first 100 customers using Gumroad's coupon feature.
actions.success: Discount activated and promoted.

actions.action: Engage with initial customers for feedback and testimonials.
actions.success: Collected feedback and testimonials from at least 10 customers.

ninetyDay.metric: Achieve 50 course sales within launch week.

ninetyDay.title: Analyze and Optimize

actions.action: Analyze sales data and customer feedback using Notion and Google Sheets.
actions.success: Compiled and analyzed sales and feedback data.

actions.action: Identify top-performing marketing channels and adjust strategy accordingly.
actions.success: Identified and documented top-performing channels.

actions.action: Implement content and marketing optimizations based on analysis.
actions.success: Made optimizations to course content and marketing strategies.

ninetyDay.metric: Improved conversion rate by 10% from launch week.

ninetyDay.title: Expand Your Audience

actions.action: Develop a referral program to incentivize current customers to share your course.
actions.success: Referral program developed and launched.

actions.action: Reach out to 5 influencers in your niche for potential collaborations.
actions.success: Established contact with at least 2 influencers for collaboration.

actions.action: Run a small-scale Facebook ad campaign targeting your defined audience.
actions.success: Launched a Facebook ad campaign with a budget of $50.

ninetyDay.metric: Increase email list by 100 new subscribers.

ninetyDay.title: Evaluate and Iterate

actions.action: Conduct a full course review with feedback from at least 20 customers.
actions.success: Completed full course review with customer feedback.

actions.action: Update course content and marketing materials based on review insights.
actions.success: Course content and materials updated.

actions.action: Plan a follow-up mini-course or advanced module based on customer interest.
actions.success: Concept for follow-up course or module planned.

ninetyDay.metric: Plan for follow-up course ready and improved course satisfaction rates.

ninetyDay.title: Scale Your Efforts

actions.action: Automate course marketing using ConvertKit and n8n workflows.
actions.success: Automated marketing workflows set up.

actions.action: Explore additional distribution channels like Stan Store and Whatnot.
actions.success: Identified and tested new distribution channels.

actions.action: Develop a strategy for hiring a VA to manage customer support and administrative tasks.
actions.success: VA strategy developed and job description ready.

ninetyDay.metric: Increase MRR to $2,800 with scalable systems in place.

toolStack.name: Notion
toolStack.why: Organize course content, calendar, and customer personas efficiently.

toolStack.name: ConvertKit
toolStack.why: Email marketing and automation tool to handle course launch and marketing sequences.
toolStack.pricing: Free for up to 1,000 subscribers, starts at $29/month.

toolStack.name: Gumroad
toolStack.why: Platform for selling digital products, perfect for hosting and distributing the course.

toolStack.name: Stripe
toolStack.why: Handles payment processing for course sales.

toolStack.name: DaVinci Resolve
toolStack.why: Professional-grade video editing software for creating course videos.

toolStack.name: Vimeo
toolStack.why: Secure video hosting and sharing for course content.

toolStack.name: Canva
toolStack.why: Design tool for creating course workbooks and promotional materials.

firstTenCustomers.script:
Hi [Name],

I'm [Your Name], and I've just launched a new mini-course on [Niche]. It's designed to take you from zero to proficient in just 4 hours. As someone interested in this niche, I wanted to offer you an exclusive early access discount of 20% off the $99 course fee. 

Click here to learn more: [Link]

Feel free to ask any questions!

Best,
[Your Name]
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Send initial outreach, follow up after 3 days, final reminder after 7 days.

pricing.growth: $149 includes access plus a one-hour live Q&A session.
pricing.premium: $199 includes all features plus personalized feedback on assignments.
pricing.raisingRules: Raise prices once you hit 100 sales or based on additional content and features.

failureModes: Trap: Overcomplicating the course content, making it overwhelming.
Trap: Ignoring initial customer feedback, leading to low satisfaction.
Trap: Failing to market the course effectively beyond the initial launch.
Trap: Setting unrealistic price points without validating willingness to pay.
Trap: Neglecting to automate marketing and sales processes.
Trap: Not updating the course or materials based on market trends.

setup.llc: Use Stripe Atlas to set up your LLC for $500.
setup.payments: Use Stripe for payment processing; integrate with Gumroad for product sales.
setup.contracts: Draft simple terms of service with a focus on refund policies using Lovable.
setup.insurance: Consider a basic business insurance policy through Hiscox for around $30/month.

scaling: Going from solo to a small team is about offloading tasks that don't need your direct input. Start by hiring a Virtual Assistant (VA) to handle customer support and administrative tasks. This frees up your time to focus on course development and marketing. As your customer base grows, consider bringing on a part-time content creator to help with new modules and updates. Invest in a marketing specialist to expand your reach and optimize conversion rates. Use project management tools like Notion to keep track of tasks and communicate with your team efficiently. By gradually building a team, you can scale operations without losing the personal touch that makes your course unique.
